sections.paragraph:
μέθυσμα, ατος, τό (s. prec. and two next entries; LXX; Philo, Agr. 157, Deus Imm. 158 al.) intoxicating drink μ. ἀνομίας intox. drink that leads to lawlessness Hm 8:3. Pl. (w. ἐδέσματα) 6, 2, 5; 12, 2, 1.—DELG s.v. μέθυ.

prec. prec. = preceding

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Agr Agr = Agraphon (non-canonical sayings of Jesus)—List 1

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Hm Hm = Mandates

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 625
